description: User favorites/wishlist management - toggle and list favorite products
authentication: Bearer JWT token required for all endpoints

endpoints.name: Get My Favorites
endpoints.description: Retrieve all favorite products for the logged-in user

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Displays grid of favorited products with image, name, price, and remove-from-favorites button

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Product card grid (similar to main catalog) with filled heart icon, product image, name, price with offer badge, and 'Add to Cart' button

endpoints.name: Toggle Favorite
endpoints.description: Add or remove a product from favorites (toggle behavior)

frontendUsage.usedBy: Storefront Product Card, Product Detail Page
frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when user clicks heart icon on product card or product detail page. Adds if not favorited, removes if already favorited.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Heart icon animates from outline to filled (added) or filled to outline (removed). Toast notification confirms action.
